name: tailwind-reference
description: Tailwind CSS utility reference, component patterns, responsive design, animations, and dark mode

entries.title: Layout Patterns (Flex, Grid, Container)
entries.content: Common layout patterns: centered card (flex items-center justify-center min-h-screen), sidebar (flex, first child w-64, second flex-1), grid (grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6), sticky header (sticky top-0 z-50), full-bleed (w-screen relative left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2).

entries.title: Glassmorphism & Modern Card Styles
entries.content: Modern UI effects: glassmorphism (bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20), gradient cards (bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500 to-pink-500), neumorphism (shadow-inner + shadow-xl), frosted nav (bg-black/30 backdrop-blur-lg).
entries.code:
Glass Card

Beautiful frosted glass effect

Premium Plan

...

entries.title: Animations & Transitions
entries.content: Built-in animations: animate-spin, animate-pulse, animate-bounce, animate-ping. Transitions: transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out. Transform: hover:scale-105 hover:-translate-y-1. Custom keyframes in tailwind.config.js.
entries.code:
Card
// animation: { 'fade-in': 'fadeIn 0.5s ease-out forwards' }, // keyframes: { fadeIn: { from: { opacity: 0, transform: 'translateY(20px)' }, to: { opacity: 1, transform: 'translateY(0)' } } }

entries.title: Dark Mode Implementation
entries.content: Use dark: prefix for dark mode styles. Enable via class strategy in tailwind.config.js. Toggle with JS by adding/removing 'dark' class on html element. Use system preference with prefers-color-scheme.

entries.title: Responsive Design Breakpoints
entries.content: Mobile-first breakpoints: sm (640px), md (768px), lg (1024px), xl (1280px), 2xl (1536px). Use min-width by default. Stack on mobile, row on desktop. Hide/show with hidden md:block. Container: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8.

entries.title: Form Input Styling
entries.content: Styled form inputs with focus states, validation colors, and consistent sizing. Use peer for conditional styles. Group for hover effects.
